evidence: "It is so much fun to watch the aspiring chefs grow and improve under Ramsey's mentoring."
"A thriller with a creepy, ancient twist. Brilliantly written and acted."
"If you need to fall asleep, watch this for an hour. Same story over and over. Boring. Repetitive."
"I didn't find the characters believable or sympathetic. The story drags."
"A definite 'must watch.' Be prepared to lose a day or two because you will feel the inescapable desire to binge watch the entire season."
"Each season is better than the last. I just finished binge watching, and I already am dying to find out what happens next season."
"Great acting; interesting plot. Set in Paris (which is almost another character on and off the screen)."
"Set in Paris (which is almost another character on and off the screen)."
"A thriller with a creepy, ancient twist. Brilliantly written and acted."
"I couldn't stop until it ended. Brilliant!"
"Amazing. The story and the characters are so well developed. I am addicted and hope for many more seasons to come!"

summary: The user enjoys fast-paced, visually engaging shows with strong emotional resonance and high production quality. They appreciate simple narratives but have shown some dissatisfaction with repetitive storytelling. Overall, they seem to favor reality, comedy, and thriller genres.
